name: Boudin
recipeIngredient: 2 lb Pork meat, 30% fat or so
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the meat, liver, salt, and pepper in enough water to cover until the meat falls apart.
2. Remove the cooked meat and reserve some of the broth.
3. While the mixture is still warm, grind together the ground meat, onion, green onions, and parsley, setting aside about 1/2 cup of the green onions and parsley mixture.
4. Mix the ground meat mixture with the reserved green onions and parsley, rice, and enough broth to make a moist dressing.
5. Stuff the dressing into sausage casings using a sausage stuffer.
6. Refrigerate or freeze as desired.
7. Prepare for eating by steaming. Avoid microwaving or frying, as these methods may shrink or burst the casing.
